message:
feat: Add comprehensive command helper utilities

Adds 315 lines of shared helper functions for RCH commands:

Version Extraction:
- extract_version_numbers(): Parse all numeric components from version strings
- major_version(): Get first version component
- major_minor_version(): Get (major, minor) tuple
- rust_version_mismatch(): Compare Rust major.minor versions
- major_version_mismatch(): Compare major versions across runtimes

Runtime Helpers:
- runtime_label(): Human-readable names for RequiredRuntime enum

SSH Helpers:
- ssh_key_path(): Expand identity file path for WorkerConfig
- ssh_key_path_from_identity(): Expand path with default fallback
- classify_ssh_error(): Categorize SSH errors from anyhow::Error
- classify_ssh_error_message(): Lower-level error classification

These utilities consolidate common patterns used across fleet, update,
and worker management commands, reducing code duplication and
ensuring consistent behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
